CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Application And Application For Default Judgment Against Defendant Getaround, Inc.; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:29 a.m. and concluding at 9:37 a.m.

Plaintiff Trial Innovations appearing represented by Joshua Nyman, Esq. via zoom.
Witness for Plaintiff Bryan Edelman appeared via zoom.
Defendant Getaround, Inc. not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court examines witness for Plaintiff Bryan Edelman and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Trial Innovations, and against Defendant Getaround, Inc. as follows:

Damages: $53,953.65
Prejudgment Interest: $809.30
Attorney Fees: $3,620.60
Costs: $480.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $58,863.55

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Application And Application For Default Judgment Against Defendant Getaround, Inc.; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Jul-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505

Plaintiff Tarial Innovations appearing represented by Joshua Nyman, Esq. via Zoom Video.
Defendant Getaround, Inc. not appearing.

Per Local Rule 2.7.B.3 no courtesy copies were submitted prior to this hearing.

The court grants a short continuance of this matter to July 2, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
Counsel was instructed to have courtesy copies submitted to dept. 505 inbox prior to the next hearing.
